verifiedPairs.note: Large text and UI components only for saffron buttons

doNotUseAlone: Status must not rely on color alone — always pair with text label or icon
Pendency chips require dot + numeric label
Table row urgency uses background tint AND status pill

keyboardNavigation.tabOrder: Logical DOM order: skip link → nav → sidebar → main → panels

shortcuts.action: Navigate passcode numpad and table sort headers

liveRegions.tableLoading: aria-busy=true with aria-label Loading compliance data

forms.labels: Every input must have visible label or aria-label
forms.requiredFields: aria-required=true and visual asterisk with sr-only '(required)'

errors.association: aria-describedby linking input to error message id
errors.timing: Announce on submit and on blur for invalid fields

tables.scope: Use th scope=col for column headers
tables.caption: Visually hidden caption describing table purpose
tables.selection: Checkbox column with aria-label Select row {name}
tables.responsive: On mobile, provide equivalent card view with same data announced in logical order

motion.reducedMotionFallback: Disable translateY hover, FAB slide, toast slide — use opacity only

testingChecklist: Axe DevTools zero critical violations on login, dashboard, compliance table
Full keyboard traversal without mouse on all primary flows
VoiceOver/NVDA announces page title and landmark regions
200% zoom: no horizontal scroll on form pages
Color blindness simulation: pendency states distinguishable
